remember: Students will be able to recall the definition and types of citizenship.
Students will be able to list the rights and duties of a citizen.
Students will be able to identify the importance of citizenship in a democracy.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of citizenship and its significance in a nation.
Students will be able to describe the characteristics of a good citizen.
Students will be able to analyze the relationship between citizenship and civic engagement.
apply: Students will be able to apply the principles of citizenship to real-life situations.
Students will be able to demonstrate civic responsibility through participation in community activities.
Students will be able to use critical thinking to resolve citizenship-related issues.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of citizenship on social justice and equality.
Students will be able to evaluate the role of citizenship in promoting national integration.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different models of citizenship in various countries.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, students will be able to understand the concept of citizenship and its importance in a democratic nation.
Students will be able to describe the rights and duties of a citizen and their significance in a democratic setup.
Students will be able to analyze the relationship between citizenship and civic engagement, and its impact on the society.
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to explain the concept of citizenship and its significance in a democracy.
Students will be able to list and describe the rights and duties of a citizen.
Students will be able to demonstrate an understanding of the importance of citizenship in a nation.
